svg.text: Host Software / ASIC Agent Engine (offline · Python)
add sub mul sll srl sra
add sub and or xor slt
CPU sw/lw instructions target addr[31]=1 to talk to MorphCore accelerator
Co-Design Loop: RL Agent → BKM Ledger → Python Compiler → model_blob.h → Main Memory → Firmware Dispatcher → MorphCore → Cycle Count → RL Agent
each iteration refines tile sizes, prefetch depth, and dataflow mode to minimize end-to-end inference cycles
